$normalizedName..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() ? newData.child('ownerUserId').val() === auth.uid : data.child('ownerUserId').val() === auth.uid)

$sessionId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() ? newData.child('ownerUserId').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('members').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() === 'owner' : data.child('members').child(auth.uid).exists() && newData.child('updatedByUserId').val() === auth.uid)

$groupId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() ? newData.child('ownerUserId').val() === auth.uid : data.child('ownerUserId').val() === auth.uid)
